texto: You know, I only claim to play three instruments. My dad is a banker, but a drummer at heart; and my mom used to teach piano lessons when she was younger. So I can play some piano, play a little drums, and fake the bass - but banjo, mandolin, and guitar are my thing.
explicacao: Citação de Charlie Worsham sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You know, I only claim to play three instruments. My dad is a banker, but a drummer at heart; and…” articula amor, heart, guitar em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como guitar e fake.

frase_original: You know, I only claim to play three instruments. My dad is a banker, but a drummer at heart; and my mom used to teach piano lessons when she was younger. So I can play some piano, play a little drums, and fake the bass - but banjo, mandolin, and guitar are my thing.

texto: I'm in this really cool place in my career, where the stage I'm on that night, whether it's the Paisley tour, the CMT tour, or a bar with 10 people in it, it is the most important show I've ever played in my life. I go to the ends of my imagination to do something that's unforgettable every night.
explicacao: Citação de Charlie Worsham sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I'm in this really cool place in my career, where the stage I'm on that night, whether it's the P…” articula trabalho, vida, imagination em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
